offer: For property managers handling 10-20 properties, inefficient scheduling causes missed maintenance deadlines. We provide a cloud-based scheduling system instead of manual scheduling via spreadsheets and phone calls.
problem: Inefficient scheduling of property inspections and maintenance tasks.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where property managers ask for help
Indie Hackers posts and comments on similar workflows

Community forums/groups where property managers share tools

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
